feature.description: Full feature development cycle: compose brief → implement → review

implement.description: Implement from an existing brief — skip the composer step

guarded-feature.description: Feature development with human approval checkpoints

sequence.checkpoint: Review the task brief above and confirm before implementation begins.
Review the diff above before the analyzer runs.

quality-implement.description: Implement with quality gate — coder iterates until analyzer approves

auto-route.description: Auto-route: composer classifies the request and dispatches to the right workflow

best-of-3.description: Get 3 independent implementations and pick the best one
best-of-3.pickerPrompt: Select the implementation with the best code quality, correctness, and minimal surface area.

parallel-review.description: Run three specialised review passes in parallel and consolidate

subtasks.prompt: Review the code for correctness and logic errors.
Review the code for security issues and vulnerabilities.
Review the code for performance and readability.

arch-debate.description: Architecture decision: proposer vs critic, analyst judges

complexity-route.description: Route to quick or quality implementation based on task complexity

feature-smart.description: Feature development with complexity-based implementation routing

smart-dev.description: Dynamic development — orchestrator chooses the right agents at runtime
smart-dev.satisfactionCriteria: The implementation is complete and correct, and the analyzer has confirmed no issues.
